debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
ident : InternalPort ℕ
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ AssocList.contains ident (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) = true →
    ∃ i, ident = { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i }

proof:
intro h
          simp only [liftFinf, AssocList.contains_eq, List.toList_toAssocList, List.any_map, List.any_eq_true] at h
          obtain ⟨x, hx_mem, hx_eq⟩ := h
          simp only [Function.comp_apply, beq_iff_eq] at hx_eq
          subst hx_eq
          exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
successful_attempts:
intro h
          simp only [liftFinf, AssocList.contains_eq, List.toList_toAssocList, List.any_map, List.any_eq_true] at h
          obtain ⟨x, hx_mem, hx_eq⟩ := h
          simp only [Function.comp_apply, beq_iff_eq] at hx_eq
          subst hx_eq
          exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
